title: NotAFreak's Plushies
description: Adds a bunch of small plushes for decoration. Mostly from Ikea's famous plush line.
body:
This is a fairly small mod that adds a bunch of decorative Plushies, mainly from Ikea.

The following plushes this mods adds:
-  Blahaj (Iconic shark :3)
-  Djungelskog (Bear)
-  Blavingad (Orca)
-  Jattestor (Elephant)
-  Skosduva (Snow fox)
-  Livlig (Small Husky)
-  Djungelskog (Monkey)
-  Gosig Golden (Golden retriever)
-  Kramig (Panda)
-  Aftonsparv (Alien)
-  Rei Ayanami



More may or may not be coming soon, depends.

[Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/notafreaks-plushies)
